channel.title: Forgali
channel.description: Solid wood furniture for every room — free Canada-wide shipping.

item.g:title: Full Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress
item.g:description: Full Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress Bedsmart Foam Mattress (Double/Full)Two-Sided Mattress (Flippable) Dimensions:W: 74½” x D: 53½” x H: 6" Description: The Full Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress is a smart and comfortable choice for loft beds, bunk beds, or standard bed frames. Designed with a low-profile 6-inch thickness, it ensures maximum safety by maintaining a safe distance between the mattress top and the guardrail — an essential feature for loft and bunk bed setups. Crafted from high-density foam for lasting support and comfort, the mattress features quilted organic cotton covers on both sides, allowing it to be flipped regularly for extended durability and even wear. The compact, low-profile design makes it ideal for spaces where mattress height is a concern, without sacrificing comfort or quality. It is recommended to use a mattress no thicker than 7 inches for loft beds and bunk beds to ensure proper guardrail protection and maximize safety. The Bedsmart Foam Mattress is a practical, high-quality choice designed to deliver both comfort and peace of mind.

item.g:title: Twin Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress
item.g:description: Twin Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress Bedsmart Foam Mattress (Single/Twin)Two-Sided Mattress (Flippable) Dimensions:W: 74½” x D: 37½” x H: 6" Description: The Twin Size 6-Inch Bedsmart Foam Mattress is a practical and comfortable option for bunk beds, loft beds, or standard twin frames. Designed with a slim 6-inch low-profile thickness, it helps maximize safety by ensuring proper distance between the mattress surface and the top of the guardrail — a crucial feature for elevated bed designs. Constructed from high-density foam for excellent support and durability, this mattress features quilted organic cotton covers on both sides, allowing for easy flipping and even wear over time. Perfect for tight spaces and elevated beds, the low-profile design maintains comfort without compromising safety or style. It is recommended to use a mattress no thicker than 7 inches for loft beds and bunk beds to ensure maximum guardrail protection and overall safety. The Bedsmart Foam Mattress offers a reliable, high-quality sleeping surface designed to meet the needs of growing families.

item.g:title: 6 Drawer Dresser
item.g:description: Solid Wood 6 Drawer Dresser in White Finish 6-Drawer Dresser Dimensions:W: 60” x D: 16” x H: 31¾”(95 cm x 47 cm x 81 cm) Description: Add classic storage and charm to any bedroom with the 6-Drawer Dresser in White. Featuring a traditional crown detail and clean lines, this dresser offers six spacious drawers to keep clothes, toys, and essentials neatly organized. Crafted from solid wood with no inferior softwoods, this piece is built for lasting durability. The drawers operate smoothly on metal glides, while recessed hardware with wood cover-ups ensures a clean, seamless, all-wood appearance. Designed to fit neatly under a loft bed or stand alone as a functional addition to any room, this dresser combines timeless design with everyday practicality—making it a perfect storage solution for growing families.

item.g:title: Solid Wood Play and Store Low Loft White Wash Finish
item.g:description: SOLID WOOD PLAY AND STORE LOW LOFT WHITE WASH FINISH COLLECTION Twin-size Low Loft Bed with Angle Ladder White Wash Finish Space-Saving Marvel: Elevate your child's room with the Modern Farmhouse Low Loft Bed with Storage. Standing at 41.5" tall, this ingenious design opens up valuable floor space, making it a smart choice for smaller rooms. Crafted for Durability & Safety: Crafted from premium solid wood and Non-Toxic, Low VOC finish ensures a safe and healthy environment. Featuring tall 15-inch guardrails and robust metal-on-metal bolt connections. With a weight capacity of up to 400 lbs, you can trust in its reliability. Clever Storage Solutions: The included drawer and shelf provide an organized haven for toys and books, while the spacious underbed area offers a world of possibilities for play and larger item storage. During assembly, position the ladder, storage, and play area on either side to suit your room's layout and your child's preferences. Easy Assembly: Clear instructions, slat roll, and all required hardware included. Assembly is hassle-free with the help of 2+ adults. This low loft bed with ladder meets or exceeds Federal safety standards for kids furniture, ensuring peace of mind for parents. Total Footprint: Twin size loft bed measures 84.25"L x 42.5"W x 41.25"H, offering ample room for play and sleep. item.g:title: Classic Twin Floor Bed
item.g:description: Classic Twin Floor Bed Description: Classic Twin Floor Bed Small in height but big on fun, our Classic Floor Bed makes the transition to a big-kid bed fun and easy. This Montessori bed is super safe for younger kids, sitting directly on the floor. Its ultra-low height helps kids climb in and out of bed on their own, giving them the independence they crave. What Kids Will Love: Montessori floor bed makes getting in and out of bed easy-peasy. Getting to sleep in a big-kid bed! What Parents Will Love: Low-to-the-ground height for kids who are just transitioning from nurseries. Twin floor bed frame has a clean, low-VOC finish, contributing to a healthy sleeping space for kids. Includes easy-to-read instructions and all the tools you need for a quick setup. item.g:title: Plank+Beam Grande Console Table with Shelf - 56"
item.g:description: Give your décor a place to shine with the Grande Console Table with Shelf. Crafted from knot-free solid wood, this long console table is built to handle real life while keeping things clean and streamlined. Its hollow leg construction gives it that bold, architectural look without the bulk, so it’s easier to move and place exactly where you want it. Plus, a spacious bottom shelf gives you double the room to style your favorite decor or stash everyday clutter in baskets. Complete with a clean, low-VOC finish, this sofa table is a piece you can feel good about bringing home. If you want to make a statement in your living room, entryway, or any space in your home in need a refresh, this solid wood console table is the piece for you.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Ernesto Dining Armchair
item.g:description: The Ernesto Dining Armchair is made for those who take comfort seriously. Crafted from a durable combo of solid rubberwood and engineered wood, this contemporary armchair is made to handle daily life and look great for the long haul. Wrapped in soft microsuede, it offers the rich look and feel of suede, minus the high maintenance. With its contemporary silhouette and supportive armrests, this upholstered armchair is equally at home at the head of the dining table, pulled up to a desk, or adding a cozy touch to your vanity. Wherever you place it, you’ll appreciate Ernesto’s plush seat and gentle support that make every moment a little more comfortable.

item.g:description: The Camden Mantel was made for moments — and for showing them off with rustic style. Made from 100% solid pine wood, this floating mantel shows off every knot and grain for a look that feels warm and real. Use it as a mantel above your fireplace or a floating shelf to fill any blank wall — either way, this decorative mantel is built to make a statement. With a sturdy wooden wall bracket and just four screws, this solid wood mantel mounts easily and securely, ready to hold your favorite décor, books, and memories.

This slipcover dining chair offers endless looks, so you can refresh your dining room without replacing a thing.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Loar Upholstered Counter Chair - 26"
item.g:description: Take your counter setup to the next level with the Loar Upholstered Counter Chair. Built with an engineered wood frame and sturdy rubberwood legs, this mid-century-inspired design is made to last. The curved seat cushion is wrapped in smooth, sustainable vegan leather—easy to clean and even easier to love. A soft, curved backrest adds all-day support, so you’ll stay comfy long after the meal ends. Finished with a clean, low-VOC coating, it’s a healthier choice for your space. With its versatile silhouette and just-right height, Loar is the perfect match for your kitchen island or counter-height table. Grab one, or go for a pair to complete the look.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Camden Dining Bench - 58"
item.g:description: The Camden Dining Bench is all about natural beauty, rustic texture, and everyday versatility. Crafted from solid pine wood and completed with a clean, low-VOC finish, this rustic dining bench puts the character of real materials front and center, showing off every knot, grain, and weathered detail. The rough-hewn surface adds that authentic, timeworn texture you can see and feel, while its sturdy build makes it a dependable spot for everyday meals, weekend gatherings, or even an entryway perch. Its streamlined design makes it easy to tuck under the table or pull out for extra seating anywhere in the home. Pair this farmhouse dining bench with the Camden Dining Table for a complete, cohesive dining setup.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Camden Dining Table - 72"
item.g:description: The Camden Dining Table celebrates the beauty of natural wood, creating the perfect backdrop for any gathering. Crafted from solid pine wood and completed with a clean, low-VOC finish, this farmhouse dining table brings the inviting warmth of a cabin retreat to every meal. Every knot, grain line, and texture is on display, making each table one-of-a-kind. Its substantial build and rough-hewn surface bring that raw, authentic feel you love, while its warm, natural wood tone sets the stage for cozy meals and long conversations. Built for everyday living, this natural wood dining table delivers that easygoing rustic style that feels right at home.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Elio Counter Chair - 24"
item.g:description: For kitchen seating that looks as good as it feels, meet the Elio Counter Chair. Built with a sturdy frame made of solid rubberwood and engineered wood, it’s designed to keep up with everyday life (and then some). The rattan backrest brings in that natural, airy texture that instantly makes your space feel more relaxed. Add in the soft bouclé cushion and you’ve got comfort that goes way beyond dinner. Whether your vibe leans mid-century, boho, or coastal, Elio’s clean lines and airy feel make it a standout pick for your kitchen island or casual dining space. Available solo or in a set of 2, this rattan and bouclé counter stool is easy to mix, match, and make your dining space feel your own.

item.g:title: Plank+Beam Elio Dining Chair
item.g:description: The Elio Dining Chair has a look you’ll love and a seat you won’t want to leave. The angled, cross-style legs and Scandinavian-inspired design add just the right amount of edge to your modern setup, all while keeping things simple and stylish.

item.g:description: Perfect for daily dinners and seasonal celebrations, our Modern Solid Wood Dining Table Set with 2 Benches brings sophisticated style to any dining room. item.g:title: Plank+Beam Mid-Century Modern Entryway Bench - 56"
item.g:description: Combining timeless style with contemporary craftsmanship, our Mid-Century Entryway Bench brings a modern look to every bedroom, entryway, and covered outdoor space. Crafted with solid Pine and Birch wood, this versatile bench pairs beautifully with every décor and design. Clean, durable finishes in neutral or bold colors coordinate with your space. Its slatted design and tapered legs offer a refined elegance. A solid wood frame with strong metal-on-metal connections supports 275 lbs. Perfect for use as an extra seating surface or as a place to lay books, bags, plants or décor. This solid wood bench is ideal for mudrooms, entryways or at the end of the bed or table. Complete your space with the lasting style of this statement piece.
